VISUAL BRANDING TOOLKIT — 2026

Progress, Ridden.

Color, typography, photography, and asset templates for global and local markets.

01 — Master Logo

Official Logo

The Energica symbol must always appear with the wordmark. Two approved layouts: standard (vertical) and horizontal.

Standard Layout

Symbol above wordmark. Ratio: symbol 6x height, 1.5x spacing, wordmark 1x height.

Standard — on corporate black
Standard — on white

Horizontal Layout

Symbol left of wordmark. Ratio: symbol 5x, spacing 1.5x, wordmark 16.5x width.

Horizontal — on corporate black
Horizontal — on white

Color Variations

Authorized on plain green, black, and white only.

On black — white wordmark, original symbol
On white — black wordmark, original symbol
On green — black wordmark, inverted symbol

Clear Space

Minimum 0.5D on all sides, where D = symbol diameter.

0.5D
0.5D
D = symbol ø

Misuse

Do Not
✕Interfere with the symbol-wordmark relationship
✕Rotate, stretch, or skew the logotype
✕Use colors other than those specified
✕Override the defined minimal clearance
✕Use on busy backgrounds that reduce legibility
✕Use the logotype in an outlined version

Photo Selection

Hero Shot
Rider at lean · motion blur
Through a corner, road blurred, machine sharp.
Hero — Italian
Landscape · heritage
Italian hills, Modena heritage.
Atmosphere
Rider with machine, mountain pass.
Detail
Suspension, tyre contact. Shallow DOF.
Product
Full bike, rider tucked, background streaked.
05 — Local Markets

Regional Lockups

Condensed lockups for social thumbnails, signage, and tight spaces. Symbol → wordmark → country, stacked tight.

Vertical — Social / Thumbnail

Netherlands
Official Importer
On black — primary
Belgium
Official Dealer
On white — print
South Africa
Official Importer
On green — events

Horizontal — Headers / Signage

Netherlands
Official Importer
Horizontal — dark bg
Belgium
Official Dealer
Horizontal — light bg
Rules
✕Never alter symbol or wordmark
✕Never make market name larger than wordmark
✕Never use local brand colors — Energica palette only
✕Never place dealer logos adjacent to lockup
